horoscope: While the Moon spends all day in your creativity sector, dear Aries, when you’re feeling self-disciplined, you’re thriving early today, and this energy helps you get on track. You can be in a great position to develop a special project or learn something special. You can be feeling good about your work and commitments. As the day advances, watch for some defensiveness or a tendency to want to prove something as the Moon squares Mars. Getting to a compromise and balance may very well be exhausting but ultimately worthwhile.

The first half of the day holds some serious energy, dear Taurus, and you want to be productive. You may see opportunities through responsibilities. Committing yourself to a goal, a cause, or a pet project can bring you down to earth. With the Moon in your solar fourth house all day, you're inclined to stick with familiar faces and places, but the current Mars transit can stir your courage to do something a little more daring. If domestic demands interfere with your personal plans or sense of independence later today, there may be some friction, but it can also be a time of creative inspiration.

You're looking to be mentally engaged today, dear Gemini, with the Moon in your busy solar third house all day, demanding some variety. While it’s a light-hearted area of the chart, the mood is on the serious side early today. You're pleasantly reminded of your commitments. You’re likely to feel especially good about working on a project or endeavor that has long-lasting potential. As the day advances, a Moon-Mars square can trigger all sorts of sensitivities. Watch for impatience with communications and secrets in general. Focusing on long-term happiness goals can be healing at this time.

The Moon spends the day in your resources sector, dear Cancer, and a quiet day would be ideal for you as emotions tend to settle in. You could feel pleasantly dedicated to your work or a program to improve your life. Self-discipline comes more naturally if your heart is in it. You may be focusing your energies on satisfying work and goals. You are more patient, focused, and persistent in pursuing your goals, and you could be doing a lot of organizing, leading, and managing right now. Transits encourage a focus on practical and sensual needs, and can be strong for really getting things done. However, there is also temperamental energy later today, and you could be distracted by challenging social problems.

While the Moon in your sign all day keeps you in a spirited mood for the most part, dear Leo, you’re especially realistic early today, and a commitment to make improvements comes more easily than usual. You're pacing yourself, and it can be a good time for gentle discipline or boundary-building. A project can give you a deeper sense of purpose. You can more fully appreciate the cooperative and personal elements of your life today, but there are potentially significant developments happening in your professional life now as well. Watch for impatience and taking things too personally later today, particularly if there are pressures to meet a rule or obligation. Still, it's a good time to get in touch with your feelings.

You’re in a good position for work, research, and investigation right now, dear Virgo. Focusing on something absorbing can do wonders for your sense of purpose. You’re looking for some level of dedication from the people around you, although this can be tricky, but you're in a generally good position to build trust in a close relationship. Improvements are in focus. The Moon spends all day in your solar twelfth house, and you're drawn to relaxing, renewing, and recharging. Distractions are likely as the day advances, so you might aim to prioritize the things that truly mean something to you.

In the first half of the day, you can find it comes easily to become thoroughly absorbed in your work and experiences, dear Libra. Partnering up to get something done might be productive at this time. As the day advances, however, be alert for a tendency to want to do too much. While goals may not be clear right now, they don't need to be, so don't let the somewhat impulsive energy make you think otherwise. You may feel the need to make a few changes to how you approach your work or obligations, but consider what truly needs improvement first before jumping into the process.

In the first half of the day, there is good energy for applying yourself to something productive and purposeful, dear Scorpio, mainly related to work, health pursuits, daily affairs, and responsibilities. You feel good about committing to something specific and making headway. Responsibilities can drop into your lap or catch you by surprise, but you're quick to adjust course if you need to. Your responsibilities to others are highlighted. You may be sensitive to offhand remarks later today, but keep in mind that it's all too easy to speak before thinking right now.

Early today, you're in a strong position for pouring extra energy and dedication into a creative project, personal interest, or learning pursuit, dear Sagittarius. You can be in an especially productive frame of mind and might feel pleasantly dedicated to a venture or a person. You might choose to show your affection through actions or practical gestures. There can be quite a bit of pressure to get things done as the day advances, so sitting idly may only serve to frustrate. You can feel especially passionate about your beliefs and opinions, and can be quite sensitive about them as well. You may want to direct your energies to areas that require updates and improvements.

You have support for productivity in the first half of the day, dear Capricorn, mainly related to business, money matters, and home life. Building relationships can be in focus. You may be helping others out, and your dedication is appreciated. Focusing on family or a practical project can relieve stress, particularly if you cut out distractions and concentrate on one thing at a time, one step at a time. Even so, if you push too far, you’ll feel the resultant tension later today, when energies are more scattered. Pacing yourself makes sense.

The first half of today has a somewhat cautious or serious vibe to it, dear Aquarius. You’re likely to see the details that aren’t working more than the systems that are, which can be helpful if you use it constructively. It can be a very productive time when problem-solving skills are emphasized. Support may come through constructive conversations. As the day advances, on the home front, some frustrations may surface that beg to be aired. While there can be a tendency to become easily offended or frustrated, consider that the tension building within you stems from a desire to grow and improve.

In the first half of the day, you’re in great shape for sorting out finances or handling a practical problem, dear Pisces. Fortunately, influences help you tap into straightforward and productive energy for work, money, business, and practical affairs. Devoting yourself to a special pursuit can help you clear your mind. Today's Moon encourages you to focus on the little things and the loose ends in your life. Distractions can undermine productivity later today, however, especially if you're excited about a project or idea but feel stretched too thin, and nervous energy is possible. However, you're motivated and, with a bit of extra focus, you're in great shape.
